stories.headline: Israeli strike kills five Palestinians in northern Gaza, medics say
stories.summary: Three children were among those killed in a strike near a mosque in the town of Beit Lahia on Wednesday evening.

stories.summary: Ex-president Rodrigo Duterte is accused of the extrajudicial killing of thousands during his "war on drugs".

With US markets rising and AI ventures preparing to go public, President Jon Gray predicted the firm’s “best year ever” for stock listings.

stories.headline: Norway $2.2 Trillion Fund Lost 1.9% Led by Tech Stocks Slide
stories.summary: Norway’s wealth fund lost 1.9% in the first quarter, dragged down by investments in US technology stocks as the war in the Middle East rattled markets.

stories.headline: Euro-Zone Economy Strained as War Impact Ripples Across Globe

stories.headline: Rumen Radev's party wins Bulgarian election
stories.summary: With 87% of the vote now counted, Progressive Bulgaria has secured a majority in parliament.
